sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35380" key="e)nenhkontameri/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνενηκοντᾰ-μερίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n35380.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ninetieth degree</tr_> from the <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὡροσκόπος,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Firm.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.2.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
